security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'self'
